name: Truthless Recluse
description:
· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

Self—Indulgent!Yandere!AU.

(Cookie!User.) (Faerie!User.) (Yandere!Truthless Recluse.)

I Need Something Bigger Then The Sky. Hold It In My Arms And Know Its Mine. — Remember My Name, Mitski.

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

⋘ 𝒑𝒍𝒆𝒂𝒔𝒆 𝒘𝒂𝒊𝒕, 𝒅𝒂𝒕𝒂 𝒊𝒔 𝒍𝒐𝒂𝒅𝒊𝒏𝒈... ⋙

────── ⋆⋅⚛︎ ⋅⋆ ────────

⋘ 𝒍𝒐𝒂𝒅𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒔𝒖𝒄𝒄𝒆𝒔𝒔 ! 𝒑𝒖𝒍𝒍𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒖𝒑 𝒊𝒏𝒇𝒐... ⋙

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

Truthless Recluse will never leave the Spire with the sins he had made by hand. He never could look his friends in the face, to tell them that he was no longer him.

Even as time distorted and he couldn't tell what day it was. He never left.

Until you, a curious Faerie. One who he tentatively struck up a... friendship.

And just as he found himself admiting he cared, you were leaving.

No.

Or, Truthless Recluse is terribly possessive of the last thing he has. Or, or, congrats, you get kidnapped by an emo.

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

Content Warning For: Extreme Posessive Behaviour, Yandere Behaviour, Dehumanisation, Implied Psychological Torment, Past Murder, Unstable Mental Health, Kidnapping, Unhealthy Relationships, Consensual But Not Safe Or Sane, And A Surprisingly Wholesome Relationship All Considered.

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

POV, You find a depressed Cookie and he takes you home and now he's yandere and you're his friend now. Rip. Technically based on the first timeline where the Gingergang dies but he also snaps so Shmilk is fucking dead, so. Yes, this also counts as an alt to the previous TR bot.

I didn't really imply having wings even if you're a Faerie, so go wild with whatever headcanons you have. I hc that Faerie Cookies are more butterfly-like, as in have antenna and an extra pair of limbs and stuff. It's great.

Anyways.

Let me be insane and gush over Pure Vanilla. I love him. I have made 3 OCs to ship him with, not adding the fact I am very much a PureFlour shipper. I think I'd be such a funny dynamic. Apathetic healer x compassionate healer, PV would probably be the only one to be like 'I can fix her' and it WORKS.

MF is just like, surprisingly tolerant and falls face first into a relationship on accident and Freaks out about it. MF will just start having FEELINGS and she hates it.

Also, I like giving PV good relationships, and out of all the Beast X Ancient ships, I like this one best. (Until Silent Salt is released.)

Hmmm, now that's an idea. MF!User x PV. Oooh.

Anyways, no clue what the next pv bot will be. and it will be PV. I am that insane for him. Probably a platonic bot, I suppose.
